## Falsification or termination criterion

<!-- State what result would invalidate the claim or stop further work. -->

## Prior-art boundary

<!-- State what is established and what is potentially new. Link claim-level audits where relevant. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Relevant program `state.md` was reviewed.
- [ ] Shared-foundation impacts are declared.
- [ ] Source facts and project inference are separated.
- [ ] Synthetic recovery is not presented as material validation.
- [ ] No unrelated program or manuscript state was changed.
- [ ] Contribution registry was updated if work/manuscript status changed.
- [ ] Tests and clean-environment workflows are reported.
